title: DRESS FOR SUCCESS CAREER CLOSET - 211info
text: LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY DRESS FOR SUCCESS CAREER CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers clothing to job seekers for job interviews and starting new careers. 1606 Santiam Road SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 9am-1pm, Tuesday 5pm-8pm Email (541) 924-5683 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 924-5683 Appointment Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, proof of address AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Work Clothing Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TRANSFORMATIONAL CLASSES MATERIAL GOODS - GAP MINISTRIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY
